attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT REP_DIST.REPORT_HEADER_ID, REP_DIST.REPORT_LINE_ID, REP_DIST.REPORT_DISTRIBUTION_ID, REP_DIST.ORG_ID, REP_DIST.SEQUENCE_NUM, REP_DIST.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, REP_DIST.LAST_UPDATED_BY, REP_DIST.CREATION_DATE, REP_DIST.CREATED_BY, REP_DIST.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, REP_DIST.CODE_COMBINATION_ID, REP_DIST.SEGMENT1, REP_DIST.SEGMENT2, REP_DIST.SEGMENT3, REP_DIST.SEGMENT4, REP_DIST.SEGMENT5, REP_DIST.SEGMENT6, REP_DIST.SEGMENT7, REP_DIST.SEGMENT8, REP_DIST.SEGMENT9, REP_DIST.SEGMENT10, REP_DIST.SEGMENT11, REP_DIST.SEGMENT12, REP_DIST.SEGMENT13, REP_DIST.SEGMENT14, REP_DIST.SEGMENT15, REP_DIST.SEGMENT16, REP_DIST.SEGMENT17, REP_DIST.SEGMENT18, REP_DIST.SEGMENT19, REP_DIST.SEGMENT20, REP_DIST.SEGMENT21, REP_DIST.SEGMENT22, REP_DIST.SEGMENT23, REP_DIST.SEGMENT24, REP_DIST.SEGMENT25, REP_DIST.SEGMENT26, REP_DIST.SEGMENT27, REP_DIST.SEGMENT28, REP_DIST.SEGMENT29, REP_DIST.SEGMENT30, REP_DIST.PREPARER_MODIFIED_FLAG, REP_DIST.AMOUNT, REP_DIST.PROJECT_ID, REP_DIST.TASK_ID, REP_DIST.AWARD_ID, REP_DIST.EXPENDITURE_ORGANIZATION_ID, REP_DIST.COST_CENTER, REP_DIST.GES_UPDATE_DATE, REP_DIST.GLOBAL_NAME 
FROM
 MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_DISTS REP_DIST
 WHERE REP_DIST.GES_UPDATE_DATE>to_date('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS')
